name: Home-Style Inner Beauty Hot Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 to 15 habanero chili peppers (Scotch Bonnet), coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and mash the mango.
2. In a food processor, combine all ingredients except the peppers.
3. Add the chopped bodies of the habanero peppers (including seeds and placenta) to the food processor.
4. Pulse until well combined but not further chopped.
5. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
Note: This hot sauce is extremely spicy and should be used sparingly. Dispose of any spills carefully, as it can damage refrigerators. Keep away from pets, open flames, children, and unsupervised individuals. Wear rubber gloves while handling habaneros to avoid irritation.
